subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace in Jaipur was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II?
question_hi: जयपुर महाराजा जयसिंह की पुलीस बनी है।
explanation_en: Amer Fort, built by Maharaja Sawai Jai Singh II, is a famous palace in Jaipur.
explanation_hi: जयंगर महाल, महाराजा सावाई जयंगर सिंह की बनी है एम फॉट, जयंगर महाल के बने हैं।
जयंगर महाल, महाराजा सावाई जयंगर सिंह की बनी है।
explanation_en: Amer Fort, built by Maharaja Sawai Jai Singh II, is a famous palace in Jaipur.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the founder of Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर नाम को उसने किया है।
explanation_en: Rao Jodha was the founder of Jaipur fort.
explanation_hi: रावाई झोधा जापुर फोट को उन्न कर दो।
रावाई झोधा जापुर फोट को उन्न कर दो।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which ancient capital was the capital of Rajasthan before Jaipur?
question_hi: राजस्थान में जापुर पढ़ी फोट को उन्न करो।
explanation_en: Amber, also known as Man Singh Nagari, was the ancient capital of Rajasthan before Jaipur was established.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which ruler built the Amber Fort?
explanation_en: Prince Jai Singh built the Amber Fort.
